## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behaviour change
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `uv run ty check src` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` bullet under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
- [ ] `uv.lock` committed (only if dependencies changed)

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, deploy considerations. -->
